name: The Marketing Coordinator
image_sign_text: ON BRAND. ON TIME. ON IT.
effect: Manage all outstanding requests simultaneously. This card is considered aligned.

clauses.name: INTAKE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a new request arrives: Add it to the queue and confirm receipt within one business day.

clauses.name: REPRIORITIZATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a senior stakeholder marks anything urgent: All other tasks are deprioritized without announcement.

clauses.name: CAPACITY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the number of active requests exceeds visible bandwidth: The coordinator is considered a bottleneck rather than a resource constraint.

witness_quote: Can you just make it pop more?
